category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bottom; official repository and docs use bottom as the project name.
docs_sources: Official ClementTsang/bottom repository states the main documentation is bottom.pages.dev with a GitHub Pages mirror; source_facts.homepage is the mirror.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies process/system monitoring; source_facts.executables lists the btm terminal CLI.
